channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Joel Embiid returns from sinus fracture to play against Charlotte
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Joel Embiid started for the Philadelphia 76ers against Charlotte on Friday night after missing a game because of a sinus fracture. Embiid was introduced to a roaring ovation and wore a protective “ Phantom of the Opera ” mask in his return.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Christian Walker agrees to $60 million, 3-year contract with Astros, AP source says
item.description: Gold Glove first baseman Christian Walker and the Houston Astros agreed Friday to a $60 million, three-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the agreement was subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Former NFL star Michael Vick officially hired by Norfolk State on Friday
item.description: NORFOLK, Va. (AP) — Norfolk State officially named Michael Vick its head football coach Friday, the latest hire of a talented NFL player with no college coaching experience to lead an HBCU program.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Penn State and SMU carry the weight of history into their CFP debuts. They're both trying to shed it
item.description: DaQuan Jones remembers the chaos. The uncertainty. The sanctions. The aftermath. How could he not? He and the rest of his Penn State teammates — those that stuck around anyway — lived through it.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers' Brock Purdy impresses after gifting offensive lineman brand-new cars for Christmas
item.description: San Francisco 49ers quarterback Brock Purdy gifted his offensive line nine brand-new cars for Christmas, as he is expected to land a big contract extension this offseason.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2024 obituaries: We said a final farewell to these famous people
item.description: They were politicians, businesspeople, athletes, artists and entertainers. This year, we said goodbye to such beloved figures as James Earl Jones, Maggie Smith, Bill Walton, Louis Gossett Jr. and Teri Garr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Netflix signs US broadcast deal with FIFA for the Women's World Cup in 2027 and 2031
item.description: Netflix has secured the U.S. broadcasting rights to the Women’s World Cup in 2027 and 2031 as the streaming giant continues its push into live sports.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: SJSU responds to volleyball player mass exodus after trans athlete scandal rocked program
item.description: San Jose State University has spoken out after seven of its players entered the transfer portal following a season marred by controversy and centered on one transgender player on the team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Towns relishes an enjoyable return to Minnesota, from the roar of the crowd to a blowout win
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Karl-Anthony Towns took some time to reflect on nine formative NBA seasons in Minnesota, arriving to the arena early for the morning shootaround before the rest of the New York Knicks.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Celtics' Jaylen Brown calls out ref for technical calls on himself, Joe Mazzulla in loss to Bulls
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Celtics forward Jaylen Brown took issue with back-to-back technical fouls called on coach Joe Mazzulla and himself late in the fourth quarter of Boston’s 117-108 loss to the Chicago Bulls.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Celtics head coach admits he'd 'rather watch something else' as NBA ratings decline
item.description: The NBA's ratings are down 25% from last season, and even Boston Celtics head coach Joe Mazzulla is part of the "problem," he admitted Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boys Basketball: Santa Fe Christian 63, Coronado 39
item.description: Boys basketball action taking place at Coronado High School as the Islanders take on #4 ranked Santa Fe Christian.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Notre Dame and Indiana get 1st taste of playoff football under the Friday night lights
item.description: Notre Dame hasn't made a national championship run since 1988. As for Indiana, the team didn't just win games this season. It dominated opponents.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James returns to score 18 in Lakers' win vs Grizzlies after missing 2 games with foot injury
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James returned to the Los Angeles Lakers on Sunday night in a 116-110 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies after a two-game break. James is fighting a left foot injury and was away from the team most of last week because of personal reasons.
item.dc:creator: KYLE GLASER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Broncos def. Colts 31-13
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— Playoff pressure makes diamonds, and the Denver Broncos proved they can shine when it counts, delivering a dominant second-half performance to defeat the Indianapolis Colts 31-13 on Sunday. The game started with postseason hopes hanging in the balance for the Broncos.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Point guard Dennis Schroder traded by Brooklyn to Golden State
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — By adding Dennis Schroder, the Golden State Warriors believe they have found the perfect backcourt mate to complement Stephen Curry. Curry can't wait to get going in what he expects to be a “seamless transition for him.” “It can help me, it can help us,” Curry said.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter wins Heisman Trophy as college football's top player
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Travis Hunter turned every play into prime time — on both sides of the ball — and ultimately took home the Heisman Trophy. Now he’s got a leg up on his celebrity coach at Colorado.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jack Hughes helps the Devils rally for a 4-1 victory over the Blackhawks
item.description: Jack Hughes scored his 13th goal during a big third period for New Jersey, helping the Devils beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-1 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs set for season-ending knee surgery, AP sources say
item.description: Dallas Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs is set for season-ending surgery on his left knee to deal with an issue that was about to sideline him for the third time in four games, two people with knowledge of the decision said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Blackhawks recall top prospect Frank Nazar from the minors
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (AP) — The Chicago Blackhawks recalled top prospect Frank Nazar from the minor leagues on Friday. Chicago also placed defenseman Alec Martinez on injured reserve, retroactive to Dec. 7.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
